commitPosition(address,address,bytes,uin.details: Called by MarketContract when a user places a bet

params.collateralAmount: USDT amount committed (plaintext — needed for refunds)
params.encryptedCommitment: TEE-encrypted bytes (direction + amount — opaque to contract)
params.market: The MarketContract address this position belongs to

params._factory: ProphetFactory address — used to validate market callers
params._oracleAgent: Oracle agent address — authorized to reveal positions

getBettorCollateral(address,address).details: Accumulates all bets if the bettor placed multiple positions in the same market

getMarketsForBettor(address).details: Used by the portfolio page to enumerate a user's active and past positions

getRevealedPositionForBettor(address,add.details: Returns empty struct and false if positions have not been revealed yet

returns.hasReveal: Whether a reveal exists for this bettor in this market

getRevealedPositions(address).details: Only populated after revealPositions() is called

refundAll(address).details: Called by MarketContract when oracle returns INCONCLUSIVE twice

revealPositions(address,(address,bool,ui.details: Called by oracle agent after TEE service decrypts all commitmentsTriggers PayoutDistributor.calculateAndDistribute() after storing positions

params.market: The market whose positions are being revealed
params.positions: Array of RevealedPosition structs decrypted by the TEE
params.teeDecryptionProof: Cryptographic proof validating the TEE decryption

factory().notice: The ProphetFactory — used to validate market addresses

getBettorCollateral(address,address).notice: Returns the total USDT a bettor has staked in a specific market

getEncryptedPosition(address,uint256).notice: Returns a specific encrypted position by market and index

getMarketsForBettor(address).notice: Returns all market addresses where a bettor has committed a position

getRevealedPositionForBettor(address,add.notice: Returns the revealed position for a bettor in a market after TEE decryption

getRevealedPositions(address).notice: Returns all revealed positions for a market

getTotalCommitted(address).notice: Returns the total USDT committed to a market across all positions

hasBet(address,address).notice: Whether a specific bettor has a position in a specific market

hasRevealed(address).notice: Whether positions for a market have already been revealed

oracleAgent().notice: The oracle agent address — only one authorized to reveal positions

payoutDistributor().notice: PayoutDistributor — called after positions are revealed

positionCount(address).notice: Total number of sealed positions in a given market

refundAll(address).notice: Issue full refunds to all bettors when a market is cancelled

revealPositions(address,(address,bool,ui.notice: Submit TEE-decrypted positions after market resolution
